table__f_p_g_m.fromXMLc
		>>> fpgm = table__f_p_g_m()
		>>> bool(fpgm)
		False
		>>> p = ttProgram.Program()
		>>> fpgm.program = p
		>>> bool(fpgm)
		False
		>>> bc = bytearray([0])
		>>> p.fromBytecode(bc)
		>>> bool(fpgm)
		True
		>>> p.bytecode.pop()
		>>> bool(fpgm)
		False
